name: Chocolate Covered Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Broken into small pieces or semisweet chocolate bits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix the cookie crumbs and butter, pressing the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake for 10 minutes.
3. Beat the cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla until well blended.
4. Add eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
5. Blend in the melted chocolate and pour over the crust. Bake for 40 minutes.
6. Turn off the oven and let the cake cool inside the oven as it continues to cool down. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan and allow it to cool completely.
7. Chill for at least 4 hours.
8. Heat the heavy cream, butter, and sugar in a heavy saucepan over medium-high heat. Stir until the sugar crystals dissolve, then bring to a boil.
9. Put the chocolate pieces into a stainless steel bowl and pour the boiling cream mixture over it. Let stand for a few minutes, stirring until smooth.
10. Cover the sides and top of the cheesecake with the ganache, smoothing it out, and chill for at least 2 hours to set.
